content.en:
Ye Tian's eighth Eternal Realm Spirit was still a perfect Eternal Realm Spirit, but for him, the difficulty of impacting the Eighth Eternal Realm Spirit still existed.

Even if he had obtained a lot of treasures in the Endless Rift Realm that would help him break through, he was not 100% sure, and it was estimated that there was a chance of about 20%.

This is still the probability of impacting the realm with the help of treasures, if you don't use treasures, the probability is too low, almost zero, and it takes a large number of times to impact the realm before there is hope of breaking through.

This time, the number of treasures is quite sufficient.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not blindly impact the eighth Eternal Realm Spirit, but used some treasures to condense the Eighth Eternal Realm Spirit, with his chances, he would be able to break through after three or four impacts at most, and it would not cost too many treasure resources.

Other resources are still enough for his wife and children to break through.

So, he doesn't need to save resources this time.

......

The depths of the Terran Sanctuary void.

Ye Tian made a breakthrough here.

When he was ready, he devoured all kinds of resources and conceived the eighth Eternal Realm Spirit within the Eternal Dao Seed.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's eighth Eternal Realm Spirit was gradually conceived to the critical moment.

Suddenly.

Click!

The eighth Eternal Realm Spirit shattered, and the first breakthrough failed.

The failure of this breakthrough brought a lot of wounds to Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed, and his physical body was also severely damaged, and he was extremely weak at the moment, and the battle was less than one thousandth of the past.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately disarmed this replica body, allowing the other replica bodies to impact and condense the eighth Eternal Realm Spirit again.

This time, Ye Tian learned from the experience of failure and once again hit the realm.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian once again faced the critical moment of condensing the Eternal Realm Spirit, but fortunately, he learned his lesson, did not make mistakes, and carefully condensed the eighth Eternal Realm Spirit.

After that, the breakthrough was extremely smooth, and Ye Tian's eighth Eternal Realm Spirit was finally completely condensed.

Bang!!!!

His physical body began to transform, and the Eternal Dao Seed was also transforming, although he was still a little weak, but with the help of treasure resources, the weakness was not very powerful.

"I finally broke through and condensed eight Perfect Eternal Realm Spirits, and then as long as I condensed one more Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit, my cultivation would have reached the high-level peak realm god realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, in a short period of time, he didn't want to raise his cultivation to the high-level peak realm god realm, it was still a little far away.

Unless he can master the true extradimensional power, use the infinite extradimensional power to improve the eternal Dao species.

As for now, he doesn't dare to do so.

After all, he is now controlling the power of the extradimensional or using the fused Kunjie wood fragments, if he unscrupulously mobilizes the power of the superdimensional to improve his eternal Dao species, the consequence is to be assimilated by the superdimensional power, then it is meaningless.

This is also the reason why he has never used the power of the extradimensional dimension to improve and refine the Eternal Dao Seed.

"If you can completely control the power of the transcendent dimension, then the power of the transcendent dimension is undoubtedly the most suitable power to improve the eternal Dao species!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already passed the period of weakness, and his strength was undoubtedly much stronger than in the past.

If he used the power of the extradimensional power, then he was enough to rival the peak realm god who had condensed eleven eternal realm spirits, and he was even more powerful.

If the God of the Netherfire Realm had not fallen, with his current strength, he would be able to kill the God of the Netherfire Realm in an instant.

"Unconsciously, my strength has reached the peak level of the realm god realm, but the peak realm gods who are stronger than me still abound!"

Ye Tian knew very well how many peak realm gods there were among those supreme forces, they were too deeply hidden, and the top forces couldn't imagine how powerful the supreme forces were, and the top forces and the supreme forces were not at the same level at all.

Among those peak realm gods, there are also many things that have fused with extradimensional (AFEC), and many of them have condensed eleven Eternal Realm Spirits, or even twelve Eternal Realm Spirits, and that kind of Peak Realm God can also kill him in an instant. []

Therefore, he is not qualified to be arrogant now, and he has to be calm.

this day.

There was another piece of good news, he had fused the second Kunjie Wood Fragment.

This Kun Realm Wood Fragment came from the Underworld God, and after he killed the Underworld God, he sorted out the remaining treasure resources of the Underworld God, including a Kun Realm Wood Fragment, and another extradimensional thing.

It's just that the other extradimensional thing is a little ordinary, and he didn't look at it, so he continued to fuse the second Kun Realm wood fragment.

Now, his two replica bodies are fused with extra-dimensional things, and their combat power is very terrifying, but the other replica bodies are still ordinary replica bodies, and they cannot exert extradimensional powers, nor can they cast extradimensional techniques.

After all, the premise of his extradimensional technique was still to use the Kun Realm Wood Fragment.

In addition to this Kun Realm Wood Fragment, he also obtained a lot of items from the items of the Underworld God, as well as some information inheritances and so on.

One of the texts contains information about extradimensional objects, and its value is very high.

From this, he knew a lot of extradimensional things, among which Kun Jiemu was among them.

It was also from that time that he knew why his extradimensional power was so powerful, because the Kun Realm Wood Fragment he fused was a medium-level extra-dimensional thing, while the other peak realm gods fused with a high probability of being a low-level extra-dimensional thing, or even unable to fuse.

It's like the god of the Underworld, who obviously has something extradimensional, but has never succeeded in fusing it.

If he succeeded in fusing it, Ye Tian would not be his opponent in the first place, let alone kill him.

"I can fuse medium extradimensional things, this news must be kept secret, otherwise it will be known by the supreme forces, and I will be in great trouble!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In addition to this, he also knew a piece of information, that is, the Supreme Forces had always looked down on the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm, and their goal had always been the Death Void.

The Death Void outside the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm is extremely dangerous, but there is still hope for the Peak Realm Gods to survive.

Almost all of their low-level extradimensional things were obtained from the Death Void, and the information about the extradimensional things was also groped through the exploration of the Death Void again and again.

But it is not easy to enter the Death Void, even if it is a peak realm god, it is impossible to go to the Death Void if he wants to, and he has to be able to enter the Death Void at a special time.

However, there was no mention of how to enter the Death Void among the Underworld Divine Items, and Ye Tian naturally didn't know.
